sentences.arabic: أَنْهَيْتُ رِحْلَتِي وَكُنْتُ أَحْمِلُ مَعِيَ ذِكْرَيَاتٍ لَا تُنْسَى.
sentences.translation: Završio sam putovanje noseći sa sobom nezaboravna sjećanja.
sentences.translationEn: I finished my trip carrying unforgettable memories with me.

sentences.arabic: رَأَيْتُ أَمَاكِنَ جَمِيلَةً وَتَعَرَّفْتُ عَلَى أُنَاسٍ طَيِّبِينَ.
sentences.translation: Vidio sam lijepa mjesta i upoznao dobre ljude.
sentences.translationEn: I saw beautiful places and met kind people.

sentences.arabic: تَعَلَّمْتُ كَلِمَاتٍ جَدِيدَةً بِالْعَرَبِيَّةِ وَتَحَسَّنَتْ لُغَتِي.
sentences.translation: Naučio sam nove arapske riječi i moj jezik se poboljšao.
sentences.translationEn: I learned new Arabic words and my language improved.

sentences.arabic: شَعَرْتُ أَنَّ السَّفَرَ يُغَيِّرُ الشَّخْصَ مِنَ الدَّاخِلِ.
sentences.translation: Osjećao sam da putovanje mijenja čovjeka iznutra.
sentences.translationEn: I felt that travel changes a person from the inside.

sentences.arabic: قُلْتُ فِي نَفْسِي: «الْعَالَمُ كَبِيرٌ وَجَمِيلٌ وَأَنَا لَمْ أَزَلْ فِي الْبِدَايَةِ.»
sentences.translation: Rekao sam u sebi: "Svijet je velik i lijep, a ja sam tek na početku."
sentences.translationEn: I told myself: "The world is big and beautiful, and I am still just at the beginning."
